title: Vatican prepares for Pope Leo XIV's AI-focused first encyclical
description: The Vatican is preparing to release Pope Leo XIV’s first encyclical in the coming weeks. The document is expected to address artificial intelligence and insist on an ethics-based development of the technology, prioritizing human dignity, social relationships and peace.

title: Trump says he discussed AI guardrails, Nvidia’s chips with Xi
description: US President Donald Trump said he discussed guardrails on artificial intelligence with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, while adding that Nvidia Corp's H200 chips also came up during a two-day summit in Beijing.
content:

title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Nvidia, retailer reports to shed light on AI boom, consumer spending
description: Stock markets are reaching new highs. Investors are watching for Nvidia's earnings report this week. This will show the strength of the artificial intelligence boom. Retailers like Walmart will also report. Their results will reveal how consumers are spending amid rising prices. These reports will be crucial for the market's direction.

title: Artificial Intelligence: Human cognition at the edge of its next transition
description: The risk is not that humans will fail to adapt in the long run. The risk is that individuals and institutions may offload faster than they can reorganise, and the gap between what is lost and what replaces it becomes destabilising
content: There is a particular kind of fear that appears whenever human cognition approaches a structural shift. Not the fear of failure or irrelevance. The deeper discomfort of sensing that the way we think, remember, and make sense of the world is changing ... [5312 chars]

title: UK firms should take steps to limit risks from frontier AI models
description: UK financial authorities are urging companies to prepare for dangers posed by new artificial intelligence. These advanced AI models possess cyber capabilities that surpass human skills in speed and scale. If misused, these abilities could significantly increase cyber threats to businesses, customers, and the entire financial system.
